creator: dennisdjensen@live.com
text:
master site: https://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/mk-with-libs.tgz - or if you already have all the necessary libraries or want them split up: http://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/libutf.tgz, http://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/libfmt.tgz, http://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/libbio.tgz, http://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/libregexp9.tgz, http://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/mk.tgz

It comes under the licenses "Vita Nuova MIT-like" or "Lucent Public License" or "Bell Labs MIT-like".

https://swtch.com/plan9port/unix/ has all the Plan 9 utilities ported to Unix, including source packages, license text links, installation explanations, etc.
